app.title: DeiMOS – A Superoptimizer for the MOS 6502
app.author: Aransentin
app.description: A Superoptimizer for the MOS 6502, a simple 8-bit CPU
use_modes: Assemble and run on a real MOS 6502
proposed_tests: Assemble a test program and measure execution time.
Verify the output of a test program matches expectations.
Compare the performance of DeiMOS to a baseline tool.
